name: agent-tools
description: Explicit Agent/Codex diagnostics, AGENTS.md policy guidance, task-context reconstruction, and Codex Skill inventory.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose Agents, audit Skills, and structure task context.
interface.longDescription: Use one explicit AgentTools entry for Agent/Codex diagnostics, AGENTS.md policy templates, task-context reconstruction, and a complete current Codex Skill inventory.
defaultPrompt: Use @AgentTools to diagnose the current Agent or Codex environment.
Use @AgentTools to structure the current task context for continuation.
Use @AgentTools to list every Skill in the current Codex runtime.
